questions.question:
Which one of the following is FALSE?



Theory of Computation: GATE CSE 2009 | Question: 16, ISRO2017
options: There is a unique minimal DFA for every regular language
Every NFA can be converted to an equivalent PDA.
Complement of every context-free language is recursive.
Every nondeterministic PDA can be converted to an equivalent deterministic PDA.
questions.correct_answer: Every nondeterministic PDA can be converted to an equivalent deterministic PDA.
